import argparse
import json
import os

from model import load_checkpoint, save_checkpoint, WeightedEnsembleModel


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument('--out', default='checkpoints/ens_b80_w20.pkl')
    ap.add_argument('--w_base', type=float, default=0.8)
    ap.add_argument('--w_window', type=float, default=0.2)
    ap.add_argument('--rank_normalize', action='store_true')
    args = ap.parse_args()

    base = load_checkpoint('checkpoints/baseline.pkl')['model']
    win = load_checkpoint('checkpoints/window.pkl')['model']
    model = WeightedEnsembleModel([base, win], [args.w_base, args.w_window], rank_normalize=args.rank_normalize)
    ckpt = {
        'type': 'weighted_ensemble',
        'model': model,
        'components': ['baseline.pkl', 'window.pkl'],
        'weights': [args.w_base, args.w_window],
        'rank_normalize': bool(args.rank_normalize),
    }
    save_checkpoint(args.out, ckpt)
    print(json.dumps({'saved': args.out, 'weights': ckpt['weights'], 'rank_normalize': ckpt['rank_normalize']}))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
